steps.title: Match the specification goal
steps.content: The goal is to specify magnesium's total mass relative to the combined mass of all elements on Earth. The notes define that ratio as a mass fraction and give magnesium's value as 154,000 ppm.

steps.title: Rule out missing or wrong values
steps.content: A compares magnesium with zinc instead of giving magnesium's value. B defines mass fraction but omits the number. D uses zinc's 40 ppm value. The sentence with magnesium's exact mass fraction satisfies the goal. The answer is C.
